=Dear {{ $json.Name }},  Thank you for contacting HR! 🙏 
🤖 Answer to Your Query: {{ $('Basic LLM Chain').first().json.text }}  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📊 YOUR COMPLETE HR DASHBOARD ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  👤 PERSONAL INFO: - Employee ID: {{ $json['Emp ID'] }} -
Name: {{ $json.Name }} -
Department: {{ $json.Department }} -
Joining Date: {{ $json['Joining Date'] }}  🌴 LEAVE STATUS: - Balance Remaining: {{ $json['Leave Balance'] }} 
days - Casual Leave: 12/year - Sick Leave: 6/year - 
Maternity Leave: 26 weeks - Apply: 2 days advance notice 
💰 LOAN & SALARY: - Loan Pending: ₹{{ $json['Loan Pending (₹)'] }} - 
Monthly EMI: ₹{{ $json['Loan EMI (₹)'] }} -
Salary Date: 28th every month -
Advance: 50% of salary allowed  🏠 WORK FROM HOME: - WFH: 2 days/week allowed - 
Approval: Manager required - Notice: 1 day advance - Not allowed: Mondays  💻
REMOTE WORK: - VPN mandatory - Available on calls - Internet allowance: ₹500/month  🏥 HEALTH & INSURANCE: - Medical cover: ₹3 lakhs/year - Emergency advance: ₹50,000 - Claim process: HR portal 
🎓 TRAINING & GROWTH: - Paid training days: 2/year
- Upskilling budget: ₹10,000/year - Apply via manager approval  📝 PERFORMANCE: - Annual appraisal: March - Mid-year review: September - Rating: Shared by manager  😤
GRIEVANCE: - Submit: HR portal - Response: 3 working days - Confidential: Yes 
🚪 EXIT PROCESS: - Notice period: 30 days - Relieving letter: 7 days - Full & Final: 45 days  📋 IMPORTANT CONTACTS: - HR Email: hr@company.com - HR Helpdesk: 1800-HR-HELP - Emergency: +91-8607779797  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ This is an auto-generated response.
